chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP. No. S-1329 of 2024 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP. No. S-1330 of 2024 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP. No. S-1331 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of cases priority 1. For orders on office objections 2. For hearing of CMA No. 10085/2024. 3. For hearing of main case. Date of hearing and Order: 26.01.2026 None present for the petitioner. --------------- Despite notice having been ordered to be repeated in terms of the order dated 10.11.2025, no one has appeared today to assist this Court. In these circumstances, the petitions are dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE Shafi
